title: pelargonium × comptum
intro: Pelargonium × comptum, also known as the Rose Geranium or Pelargonium roseum, is a plant species within the Geraniaceae family, primarily known for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The leaves and flowers of the plant have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, due to their calming and anti-inflammatory effects. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × comptum include its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as teas, capsules, or essential oils, which can be used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
